query:
SELECT cpa.*, p.name as projectName, p.id as projectId, u.email as userEmail
FROM client_project_assignments cpa
JOIN projects p ON cpa.projectId = p.id
JOIN users u ON cpa.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'traceybechtol@gmail.com'
AND (p.name LIKE '%Oncor%' OR p.name LIKE '%Switch%');
